leadText: The Poffin Case (Japanese: ポフィンケース Poffin Case) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV. It allows the player to store Poffins cooked from Berries.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Passive effect [ edit | edit source ] Holds up to 100 Poffins that the player has made at the Poffin House or bought at the Veilstone Department Store .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A case for storing Poffin cooked from Berries. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A case for storing Poffins cooked from Berries.
